name: yootheme_builder_diagnose
description: Run a full diagnostic: hit /health (no auth), then attempt an authenticated call (/etag) to confirm the Bearer key is valid. Use when health passes but tools return 401/403.

name: yootheme_builder_element_add
description: Add a new element to a template. Provide `parent_path` (or "" for root), `element_type` (e.g. "headline", "text", "grid"), and optional `props` / `children`. Returns the new element's JSON-Pointer path. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

parent_path.description: JSON-Pointer of the parent node ("" for template root, "/0/children/2" for nested). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to find.

element_type.description: Type of element to create (e.g. "headline", "text", "grid"). Use yootheme_builder_element_types_list for the catalogue.

props.description: Element props object (e.g. `{title: "Hello", margin: "default"}`). Use yootheme_builder_element_type_get_schema to discover available keys.

children.description: Optional initial children — array of element objects.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

name: yootheme_builder_element_bind_source
description: Bind a Builder source to an element (sets `props.source`). Pass the source name from yootheme_builder_sources_list. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

source_name.description: Source name as listed by yootheme_builder_sources_list (e.g. "wp_posts", "apimapper_my-flow").

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

name: yootheme_builder_element_clone
description: Clone an element as a sibling (same parent, immediately after the source). Returns the new element's path. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

name: yootheme_builder_element_delete
description: PERMANENTLY delete an element and all its children. Cannot be undone. Always ask the user to confirm first, then call again with `confirm: true`. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute. Ask the user for explicit confirmation first.

name: yootheme_builder_element_get
description: Get the full element object at a specific JSON-Pointer path, including props and children. Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover paths.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

name: yootheme_builder_element_get_binding
description: Read the source binding (and source_config/source_args/etc.) attached to an element. Returns the empty object if the element is not bound.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

name: yootheme_builder_element_list
description: List all elements in a template as a flat array with JSON-Pointer paths + element types. Best starting-point for "find the element I want to edit".

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

name: yootheme_builder_element_move
description: Move an element to a new parent + index in the tree. Useful for reordering or reparenting (e.g. moving a card from one grid column to another). Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

to_parent_path.description: Destination parent JSON-Pointer ("" for template root).

to_index.description: Zero-based index within the destination parent.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

name: yootheme_builder_element_type_get_schema
description: Get the prop/field schema for a single element type. Use the result to discover valid keys for `props` when calling yootheme_builder_element_add or _update_settings.

type_name.description: Element type name (e.g. "headline", "text", "grid"). Use yootheme_builder_element_types_list to discover.

name: yootheme_builder_element_types_list
description: List all element types registered on this YOOtheme site (built-ins + YOOessentials + uEssentials extras, depending on the install). Names returned here can be passed as `element_type` to yootheme_builder_element_add.

name: yootheme_builder_element_unbind_source
description: Remove the source binding from an element. Clears `props.source`. Destructive in the sense that it may break dynamic-content rendering — always ask the user to confirm. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute. Ask the user for confirmation first before unbinding a dynamic source.

name: yootheme_builder_element_update_settings
description: Replace the `props` on an element. Use this for any setting change — title, margins, classes, sources, etc. Requires ETag. Existing props NOT in the request are removed.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

element_path.description: JSON-Pointer path to the element (e.g. "/0/children/2"). Use yootheme_builder_element_list to discover available paths.

props.description: Element props object (e.g. `{title: "Hello", margin: "default"}`). Use yootheme_builder_element_type_get_schema to discover available keys.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag from yootheme_builder_get_etag. Required to detect concurrent edits — call get_etag first, pass the value here. On 412 Precondition Failed, re-fetch the ETag and retry.

name: yootheme_builder_get_etag
description: Get the current top-level state ETag. Pass this back via the `etag` parameter on any write tool to prevent overwriting concurrent edits.

name: yootheme_builder_health
description: Check that the YOOtheme Builder MCP plugin is installed and reachable. Returns plugin version, YOOtheme Pro version (if loaded), and the list of available REST endpoints. Unauthenticated probe — call this first when troubleshooting connectivity.

name: yootheme_builder_page_get_layout
description: Get the full layout tree for one template. Returns the nested element structure as stored by YOOtheme. Heavy — prefer yootheme_builder_page_get_schema for navigation, then yootheme_builder_element_get for specific elements.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

name: yootheme_builder_page_get_schema
description: Get the flat schema for a template — a list of nodes with their JSON-Pointer paths and element types. Best entry-point for navigation: lighter than page_get_layout, sufficient to locate elements before editing.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

name: yootheme_builder_page_publish
description: Publish a template. Currently behaves as save + sets `published: true` in the response. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag (e.g. "abc123" from yootheme_builder_get_etag). Required for write operations after the first call.

name: yootheme_builder_page_save
description: Re-run save-transforms on a template and persist. Useful after a series of low-level writes to trigger the Builder normalization pass. Requires ETag.

template_id.description: Template ID (e.g. "default"). Use yootheme_builder_pages_list to discover.

etag.description: Optimistic-lock ETag (e.g. "abc123" from yootheme_builder_get_etag). Required for write operations after the first call.

name: yootheme_builder_pages_list
description: List all YOOtheme templates ("pages") on the site. Returns id, label and usage metadata for each. Use this first to discover template IDs.

name: yootheme_builder_sources_list
description: List all Builder sources available on this site, grouped by origin (apimapper, wordpress, essentials). Each source exposes its name + label so an agent can pick the right one for `element_bind_source`.
